title: Planner Blueprint Spec
purpose: Define the dispatcher-selected planning agent blueprint contract for Harness Studio.

terminalOutputNode.purpose: The framework must end with a planning-agent-selected output-capable specialist from the catalog.

agents.description: Execution order. The dispatcher must be first, the planning agent must be second, and all remaining nodes are expert selections ordered by execution priority.

specs.description: Dependency order. Spec nodes must mirror the agent execution order one-to-one.

capabilities.description: Resolution order. Capability nodes must be grouped by resolver pass order.

segments.name: structure
segments.description: Structural edges must be emitted first.

classes.name: harness_association
classes.description: Harness association edges link the harness root to agent nodes. The harness is the source and the agent is the target.

classes.name: spec_definition
classes.description: Spec definition edges link agents to spec nodes. The agent is the source and the spec node is the target.

segments.name: dependency
segments.description: Dependency edges must be emitted after structural edges.

classes.name: runtime_delegation
classes.description: Runtime delegation edges connect the harness root to the entry agent. The harness is the source and the entry agent is the target.

classes.name: phase_transfer
classes.description: Phase transfer edges pass outputs between adjacent stages. The upstream stage is the source and the downstream stage is the target.

classes.name: execution_dependency
classes.description: Execution dependency edges encode runtime ordering constraints. The prerequisite or upstream node is the source and the dependent or downstream node is the target.

segments.name: resolution
segments.description: Capability resolution edges must be emitted last.

classes.name: capability_resolution
classes.description: Capability resolution edges connect agents to resolved capabilities. The agent is the source and the capability is the target.

classes.name: capability_missing
classes.description: Capability missing edges record unresolved capability dependencies. The agent is the source and the unresolved capability is the target.

edges.description: Graph order. Edges must be emitted in structure -> dependency -> resolution order.
